description: The DebugHandOffsetCompensation component constantly changes the mapping offsets of the left and right controllers with the values in its fields. These offsets determine how a controller is kept in a consistent orientation to other controllers a user can have.

fields.LeftHandPosition: The position offset of the left hand.
fields.LeftHandRotation: The rotation Offset of the left hand.
fields.RightHandPosition: The position offset of the right hand.
fields.RightHandRotation: The rotation offset of the right hand.
